rationale: The cited paper is a close conceptual/methodological precursor: it links neurophysiological ad responses to market outcomes and tests incremental prediction beyond traditional measures, which directly parallels the citing paper’s core design goal (EEG-based prediction of box office beyond prerelease characteristics and liking). Given this strong overlap in problem framing and modeling logic, and a confirmed DOI-level reference match (10.1509/jmr.13.0593), this is not clearly an incidental mention.
